name: aifunctions-js
description: Minimal ask() API for remote (OpenRouter) and local (llama.cpp / Transformers.js) LLMs

scripts.test:unit: node --test test/ai.ask.test.ts test/askJson.test.ts test/content.libraryIndex.test.ts test/content.fullLibrarySnapshot.test.ts test/content.skillsResolver.test.ts test/coverage.orchestrator.test.ts test/functions.callAI.test.ts test/functions.router.test.ts test/jsonHelpers.test.ts test/openrouter.parse.test.ts test/openrouter.request.test.ts test/parseJsonResponse.test.ts test/runJsonCompletion.test.ts test/safeJsonParse.test.ts test/serve.activityLog.test.ts test/serve.attribution.test.ts test/serve.usageTracker.test.ts test/validateJson.test.ts
scripts.content:index: npm run build && nx-config2 run --env-file .env -- tsx scripts/updateLibraryIndex.ts
scripts.content:index:dry: npm run build && nx-config2 run --env-file .env -- tsx scripts/updateLibraryIndex.ts -- --dry-run
scripts.content:index:real: npm run content:index && npm run content:index:copy-fallback
scripts.content:index:real:full: npm run content:index && npm run content:index:copy-fallback && npm run content:index:copy-full-fallback
scripts.content:index:static: npm run build && nx-config2 run --env-file .env -- tsx scripts/updateLibraryIndex.ts -- --static-only
scripts.coverage:all: npm run build && nx-config2 run --env-file .env -- tsx scripts/ensureAllFunctionsCoverage.ts
scripts.coverage:all:full: npm run coverage:all && npm run content:index:copy-fallback && npm run content:index:copy-full-fallback
